testcase.name: test_breakdown_shape

failure.message:
AssertionError: 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_35.py:122: in test_breakdown_shape assert r.status_code == 200, f"{r.status_code}: {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
